title: Certificate Viewer
description: Inspect subject, issuer, validity, fingerprint, SANs, and OpenSSL details from an X.509 certificate.

fields.help: Paste PEM content or upload .crt / .cer / .pem / .der files.

placeholders.content: Paste certificate content, for example -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- ...

notes.title: When to use this
notes.description: Useful when you want to verify exactly which certificate is deployed, confirm validity windows, or check SAN coverage before release.

empty.title: Paste or upload a certificate to start
empty.description: The right side highlights the certificate fields people check most often and keeps the full OpenSSL output for deeper inspection.

errors.title: Inspection failed
errors.requestFailed: Certificate inspection failed. Please verify the input format.
